instruction: I would like to pad all the numbers in the 'Old ID' column with zeros in front, to fill them up to seven digits in the 'New 7 Digit ID' column.

steps.suggested_step: Click cell D2 again to select it.
Drag the fill handle (small square at bottom right corner of cell D2) down through cell D20.

steps: Click cell D2 again to select it.
Drag the fill handle (small square at bottom right corner of cell D2) down through cell D20.
